zh.lifeSummary: 當John William Cunningham於1715年出生在美國康乃狄克州劍橋大學默里 倫敦格洛托時，他的父親Andrew James Cunningham55歲，母親Elizabeth Nichols47歲。他於大約1734年與Mary Margaret在美國康乃狄克州劍橋大學默里 倫敦格洛托結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1765年11月24日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州利其費爾德伍德伯里享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John William Cunningham于1715年出生在美国康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦格洛托时，他的父亲Andrew James Cunningham55岁，母亲Elizabeth Nichols47岁。他于大约1734年与Mary Margaret在美国康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦格洛托结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1765年11月24日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州利其費爾德伍德伯里享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cunningham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the province of Cunningham in Ayrshire, first recorded in 1153 in the form Cunegan, a Celtic name of uncertain origin. The spellings in -ham, first recorded in 1180, and in -ynghame, first recorded in 1227, represent a gradual assimilation to the English placename element -ingham.

Irish: surname adopted from Gaelic Ó Cuinneagáin ‘descendant of Cuinneagán’, a personal name from a double diminutive of the Old Irish personal name Conn meaning ‘leader, chief’. This name is also adopted for Ó Connacháin, a variant of Ó Connagáin ‘descendant of Connagán’, from a diminutive of the personal name Conn.
History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Wernebald de Cunynghame, who was granted the manor of Cunningham by Hugh de Morville in the early 12th century.

variants.name: Cunigan
meanings: Altered form of Scottish or Irish   Cunningham  .

variants.name: Conahan
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Connachaín (see Cunningham ).

variants.name: Conaghan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Cormac, Fergal.
Scottish (Lanarkshire and Renfrewshire) Irish (Donegal): from Ó Connacháin, a variant of Ó Connagáin, see Cunningham .

variants.name: Cuningham
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Cunningham  .

variants.name: Cummingham
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Cunningham  .

variants.name: Cunnigham
meanings: Scottish and Irish (Donegal): variant of   Cunningham  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.description: Created on October 9, 1751 from Fairfield, New Haven and   Hartford Counties
October 9, 1751, the town of Woodbury was transferred from Fairfield County at the formation of Litchfield County

en.lifeSummary: When John William Cunningham was born in 1715, in Groton, New London, Connecticut, United States, his father, Andrew James Cunningham, was 55 and his mother, Elizabeth Nichols, was 47. He married Mary Margaret about 1734, in Groton, New London, Connecticut, United States. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 24 November 1765, in Woodbury, Litchfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John William Cunningham est né en 1715, à Groton, New London, Connecticut, États-Unis, son père, Andrew James Cunningham, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Nichols, avait 47 ans. Il a épousé Mary Margaret environ 1734, à Groton, New London, Connecticut, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 24 novembre 1765, à Woodbury, Litchfield, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 50 ans.

Er hat um 1734 in Groton, New London, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten Mary Margaret geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 24. November 1765 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Woodbury, Litchfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John William Cunningham è nato il nel 1715 nel Groton, New London, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, Andrew James Cunningham, aveva 55 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Nichols, aveva 47 anni. Lui sposato Mary Margaret circa 1734, nel Groton, New London, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 24 novembre 1765, nel Woodbury, Litchfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John William Cunninghamが1715年にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ニュー ロンドングロトンで生まれた時，父Andrew James Cunninghamは55歳，母Elizabeth Nicholsは47歳であった。約1734年にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ニュー ロンドングロトンでMary Margaretと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1765年11月24日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州リトチフィールドウッドブリーで50歳で死去した。

ko.Groton, New London, Connecticut: 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 그로턴
ko.Springfield, Burlington, New Jersey, Bri: 미국 뉴저지 주 버링턴 스프링필드 타운시프 스프링필드

ko.Groton, New London, Connecticut Colony,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 그로턴
ko.Of Groton, New London, Connecticut: 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 그로턴
ko.lifeSummary: John William Cunningham(이)가 1715년 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 그로턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Andrew James Cunningham(은)는 55세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Nichols(은)는 47세였다. 그는 대략 1734년 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 그로턴에서 Mary Margaret(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1765년 11월 24일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 리트ch필드 우드버이에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John William Cunningham nasceu em 1715, em Groton, New London, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Andrew James Cunningham, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Nichols, tinha 47 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Margaret aproximadamente 1734, em Groton, New London, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de novembro de 1765, em Woodbury, Litchfield, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John William Cunningham родился в 1715 г. в местности гротон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Andrew James Cunningham было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Nichols, 47. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Margaret около 1734 г. в местности гротон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 24 ноября 1765 г. в местности вудбури, личфиелд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 50 лет.
